Tartan Website – Completed Updates

Menu Page

URL: https://tartanofredlands.com/menus/

  • The incorrect menu image has been removed and the page is now displaying the correct, updated content.

Private Events Page

URL: https://tartanofredlands.com/private-events/

  • A complete private-event inquiry system has been implemented. Guests can now submit:

    • Event date

    • Number of guests

    • Event time

    • Notes / special requirements

  • This form now mirrors the advanced functionality used on the Falconer private-events page.

  • All submissions are routed through the new SMTP configuration and delivered to the updated contact email: info@tartanofredlands.com.

Reservations Page

URL: https://tartanofredlands.com/reservation/

  • The OpenTable reservation widget has been fully embedded and configured.

  • Integration is successfully connected using your provided OpenTable login credentials.

  • Reservation requests now operate seamlessly without additional user steps.

SMTP & Forms – Completed Setup

  • SMTP has been fully configured across all Tartan website forms.

  • All form submissions (private-events, contact forms, and other inquiry points) now send properly through a secure mail route.

  • Delivery address has been updated to: info@tartanofredlands.com.

  • DKIM/SPF settings have been validated for improved email deliverability.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: meeting with Jeffrey focused on reviewing SEO performance and discussing potential email marketing. We presented the SEO improvements for both Tartan and Falconer, including increased traffic, keyword rankings, and overall visibility. Jeffrey asked how he could reach the #1 ranking for certain keywords, and we explained that additional strategies like blog content and backlinks would help, but Falconer currently does not have blog content in its plan. He also showed interest in email marketing but does not want to commit immediately; instead, he requested a test email campaign (for example, promoting Saturday prime rib) to see how it looks and performs before signing up. He asked us to confirm with Ravi the $200/month email marketing details, how many campaigns can be sent per month, and whether it requires a yearly contract. He also asked if emails from Tartan and Falconer can be combined legally, suggesting adding a website opt-in stating customers may receive emails from both restaurants. The next step is to run the test email campaign and review the results with him next week before he decides whether to proceed.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: TartanofRedlands.com has recently undergone a full-scale redesign, enhancing both performance and visual appeal for a seamless user experience across all devices. The site’s SEO was optimized through a thorough audit, improving crawlability and indexing, while advanced caching strategies significantly reduced load times and strengthened Core Web Vitals. With a mobile-first approach, the website now delivers consistent responsiveness on smartphones, tablets, and desktops. To further enhance performance, plugin settings were updated, blog SEO optimized with better meta tags, internal linking, and image SEO, and errors from the SEO audit reports were resolved, including fixing broken links and addressing Core Web Vitals issues. These updates ensure a faster, more engaging experience for both users and search engines.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes:
The updated website now delivers a seamless and consistent user experience across all devices, built with a mobile-first approach that ensures full responsiveness on smartphones, tablets, and desktops.

A detailed SEO audit was conducted to enhance search engine visibility, improving crawlability, indexing, and the overall site structure. Performance was significantly boosted through advanced caching strategies, resulting in faster load times and improved Core Web Vitals.

Additional enhancements included optimizing plugin configurations, updating website settings, and ensuring regular plugin updates with proper backups for site security and stability. Blog content was also refined with optimized meta tags, stronger internal linking, and improved image SEO.
